metadata.title: Tiquiz
metadata.description: Create engaging quizzes, capture qualified leads, and grow your audience.

common.aiRewriteTitle: Rewrite with AI in the quiz tone

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Run your quizzes like an entrepreneur — dated numbers, clear trends.
stats.emptyDesc: Create and share a quiz to see your statistics here.

acquisition.title: Lead acquisition
acquisition.empty: No leads captured in this range.

stats.eventsNoticeDesc: New views, starts and completions are now timestamped — the charts will fill in as visitors come. Meanwhile the lifetime totals stay reliable.

quizForm.aiIntentionLabel: Why are you creating this quiz?
quizForm.aiIntentionPlaceholder: E.g.: Invite to try Tiquiz, offer a free audit, propose training matched to profile, guide to my community…
quizForm.aiIntentionHint: Your concrete business goal — the AI generates a CTA specific to each result so visitors move toward it naturally.
quizForm.aiGenerateError: Generation failed. Check your connection and try again.
quizForm.targetSaved: Target audience saved to your profile.
quizForm.aiGenerated: Quiz generated! You can edit it before saving.
quizForm.aiObjectiveMulti: Select one or more objectives for your quiz
quizForm.aiChatDescription: Answer in a few sentences — I'll suggest angles matched to your business.
quizForm.aiChatKickoff: Help me find a good quiz idea for my business.
quizForm.aiChatError: Something went wrong. Try again or use the direct form.
quizForm.aiChatCapReached: Chat ended. Use the form to adjust.
quizForm.aiChatBriefHint: I'll generate your quiz now with these details.
quizForm.aiPersonalizeHint: Adapt questions, results and CTAs to the visitor. The AI produces variants directly if you enable the options below.
quizForm.errFreePlanLimit: The free plan is limited to 1 quiz. Upgrade to a paid plan to create more!

quizForm.importPdfDocxHint: For PDF / DOCX, copy the text into a .txt file before importing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.contentLocaleDesc: Default language for AI-generated quizzes and content. You can still override it on any specific quiz.
settings.sioDesc: Connect your Systeme.io account to sync leads automatically. Find your API key in Systeme.io > Settings > API.
settings.subtitle: Configure your account and preferences
settings.audienceDesc: Describe your audience — pre-filled when creating quizzes with AI
settings.audiencePh: e.g. I help freelance designers land high-paying clients
settings.privacyDesc: Default URL used in your quizzes
settings.logoDesc: Upload your logo or paste a URL
settings.websiteDesc: URL of your site (shown in quizzes)
settings.autoDesc: Once a lead is captured by your quiz, Tiquiz puts a tag on the contact in Systeme.io. That tag can trigger an automation — campaign signup, course access, community add, etc. Everything is configured in Systeme.io, no code needed.
settings.autoStep1Title: Create your tags in Systeme.io before building your quiz
settings.autoStep1P1: In Systeme.io > Contacts > Tags, create one tag per quiz result you want to automate. Examples: quiz-visionary, quiz-strategist, quiz-share (for participants who share).
settings.autoStep1P2: Then, when building your quiz in Tiquiz, link these tags to each of your results from the Systeme.io tab.
settings.autoStep2P1: In Systeme.io > Automations > Rules, click Create a rule.
settings.autoStep2Trigger: Trigger: "Tag added to a contact" → pick your tag (e.g. quiz-visionary)
settings.autoStep2Actions: Actions (chain as many as you want):
settings.autoStep2A1: Subscribe to an email campaign (onboarding sequence, newsletter…)
settings.autoStep2A2: Grant access to a course in your Systeme.io school
settings.autoStep2A4: Send a one-off email (welcome, bonus, etc.)
settings.autoStep2A5: Add another tag, fire a webhook, etc.
settings.autoStep3Title: What happens when a lead answers
settings.autoStep3P: The participant enters their email → Tiquiz creates (or updates) the contact in Systeme.io and puts the tag matching their result. Systeme.io detects the tag and triggers every action in your rule. Zero clicks on your end.
settings.autoTestTitle: Important when you test your quiz
settings.autoTestP: Systeme.io will not re-trigger an automation if the tag is already on your test email. Before each new test, go to Contacts, open your test contact, and manually remove the tag — otherwise you'll see your contact in Systeme.io but the rule won't fire and you'll think it's broken.
settings.confirmCancelSub: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You'll go back to the free plan (1 quiz, 10 responses/month).
settings.cancelInstructions: To cancel, contact us at hello@ethilife.fr or manage your subscription from Systeme.io.
settings.cancelRequested: Cancellation registered. You keep access until the end of your current billing period.
settings.cancelError: Could not cancel. Try again or contact hello@ethilife.fr.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel your subscription?
cancelDialog.body: You keep full access until the end of your current billing period, then you'll automatically move to the free plan. Your quizzes, surveys and existing leads stay saved.

settings.paymentsManaged: Payments are handled by Systeme.io. You can change plan at any time.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Deletes all your data, quizzes and leads
settings.confirmDeleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible.

tutorial.welcomeSubtitle: Create quizzes, capture leads, grow your list.
tutorial.welcomeBody: In 1 minute, I'll show you the essential tools. Ready?
tutorial.welcomeStep1: Create your first quiz in a few clicks
tutorial.welcomeStep3: Connect Systeme.io to sync your contacts
tutorial.welcomeStep4: Share and grow your email list
tutorial.welcomeOptOut: I already know Tiquiz, don't show this guide again
tutorial.completeBody: You've seen everything Tiquiz has to offer. Now take action: create your first quiz and set up Systeme.io.
tutorial.completeTipDesc: Here's what we recommend to get started:
tutorial.completeTipQuiz: Create your first quiz to test the flow
tutorial.completeTipSio: Set up your Systeme.io API key in Settings
tutorial.completeTipShare: Share your quiz's public link with your audience
tutorial.nudgeDesc: 1 minute to discover each tool and know exactly what to do.
tutorial.tooltipDashboard: Dashboard — your home page. Find your quizzes, key stats, and create a new quiz in one click.
tutorial.tooltipCreate: Create a quiz — build one manually or let AI generate it for you. Set up questions, results, and SIO integrations.
tutorial.tooltipQuizzes: My quizzes — find all your quizzes here. Activate, edit, or delete them, and copy the public link in one click.
tutorial.tooltipLeads: My leads — all contacts captured by your quizzes. Export them or sync with Systeme.io.
tutorial.tooltipStats: Statistics — track your quiz performance: views, completion rate, conversions, and shares.
tutorial.tooltipSettings: Settings — configure your language, Systeme.io API key, and default preferences.
tutorial.tooltipComplete: Tour complete! Create your first quiz, set up Systeme.io, and share your link.

quizEditor.coverageOk: {count} of {total} questions lead here — well balanced
quizEditor.coverageDanger: No question leads to this result ({count} questions total)
quizEditor.coverageHeadingDanger: This result can never be attributed
quizEditor.coverageHeadingWarn: Low chance of being attributed — {count}/{total} questions lead here
quizEditor.coverageHelp: For a result to be picked, several questions need to lead to it. Adjust the options on your questions, or ask the AI to rebalance.
quizEditor.rebalanceDialogBody: The AI will suggest reassigning some options so "{target}" becomes reachable. Your question and result texts stay unchanged.
quizEditor.rebalanceIntentPh: e.g. this result is for authors looking for a layout-design training
quizEditor.rebalanceIntentHint: The AI uses this to pick the most relevant options.
quizEditor.rebalanceApplied: {count} option(s) reassigned. Don't forget to save.
quizEditor.rebalanceNoChange: The AI thinks no change is needed — your quiz is already balanced.
quizEditor.captureFormHint: Pick the fields required before the results screen.
quizEditor.personalizeAskFirstNameHint: Use {name} in your copy to insert it.
quizEditor.personalizeAskGenderHint: Offers He / She / They and adapts your copy.
quizEditor.optionShareRequestHint: Prompt the visitor to share the quiz before seeing their results, in exchange for the bonus. The step appears between email capture and the results.
quizEditor.bonusHint: Describe what the visitor receives when they share.
quizEditor.bonusVisualHint: Mockup, image or GIF to highlight the bonus.
quizEditor.shareMessageHint: Pre-filled text when the visitor shares.
quizEditor.shareTagHint: Added to the contact when they actually share. Triggers your automation.
quizEditor.defaultCtaHint: Only used for results that don't have their own CTA. You can set a specific one on each result from the Edition tab.
quizEditor.designFontPreviewHint: Live preview in the right panel.
quizEditor.designLogoShared: Shared across all your quizzes (profile setting).
quizEditor.previewClickHint: Clicking an option moves to the next question.
quizEditor.previewCaptureSubtitleDefault: Enter your email to see your profile.
quizEditor.previewCaptureSubtitlePh:
Subtitle…
An empty line creates a paragraph, a dash « - » starts a bullet.
quizEditor.previewBonusHeadingDefault: A little gift before your results
quizEditor.previewBonusIntro: Share the quiz to receive, along with your results:
quizEditor.previewBonusNoNetworks: Enable at least one network in the Share tab
quizEditor.previewResultTagHint: Applied to the lead who gets « {title} ». Use it to segment your automations.
quizEditor.previewPoweredByLink: This quiz is powered by Tiquiz
quizEditor.shareTabCustomLinkHint: Pick a short, memorable URL. Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only.
quizEditor.shareTabNetworksHint: Pick which networks appear on the result page.
quizEditor.shareTabSeoHint: Description used when a visitor shares the link.
quizEditor.shareTabSeoPlaceholder: Short hook shown below the shared link title…
quizEditor.shareTabCustomFooterPaidHint: Replace « This quiz is powered by Tiquiz » with your own signature.
quizEditor.shareTabCustomFooterFreeHint: Available on a paid plan. Otherwise the Tiquiz footer remains.
quizEditor.shareTabCustomFooterTextPh: E.g.: This quiz is powered by My Brand
quizEditor.personalizeHint: Optional screen before the first question. The ✨ button next to each field auto-generates the gender variants.
quizEditor.previewFreeTextPh: The respondent will type their answer here…

survey.aiHint: Pick a methodology, describe your audience: AI builds a ready-to-share survey.
survey.aiTargetHint: Who is it for? The more specific, the more relevant the survey.

survey.aiIntentionHint: What you'll do with the answers (next step, action…).
survey.aiIntentionPlaceholder: e.g. identify objections to my premium offer
survey.aiLocaleHint: The language AI will write the survey in.
